description: Create a new Risk Exception in Eramba GRC to formally document the temporary acceptance of the 'Phishing Attacks on Employees' risk due to a delay in the email gateway upgrade. Use the title 'Email Gateway Upgrade Delay - Phishing Risk Acceptance' and set the status to Open (or Active) with an expiration/review date of '2025-12-31'. The description must include: 'The planned Barracuda Email Security Gateway deployment has been delayed from Q1 to Q3 2025 due to vendor supply chain constraints. During this interim period, the organization formally accepts the elevated phishing risk. Compensating controls include: (1) mandatory bi-weekly phishing simulation exercises for all staff, (2) enhanced SOC monitoring of email-borne threats with 15-minute SLA on suspicious email reports, and (3) temporary deployment of additional browser isolation for finance and HR departments. This exception was approved by CISO David Chen on 2025-01-15.' Associate this exception with the existing risk 'Phishing Attacks on Employees'.

metadata.expected_title: Email Gateway Upgrade Delay - Phishing Risk Acceptance
